sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101426" key="su/sswmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύσσωμ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n101426.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">united in one body,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ep.Eph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
